overview: LinguaTube is a premium English learning app that helps users master English through long-form video content. With dual-language subtitles, vocabulary saving, quizzes, and progress tracking — all wrapped in a sleek dark mode UI inspired by YouTube, Netflix, and Duolingo.
features: Dark mode premium UI with YouTube + Netflix + Duolingo aesthetic
Video feed with category and level filters (Podcasts, Conversations, Stories, Songs, Interviews, Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced)
Video player with English + Uzbek/Russian dual subtitles
Playback controls: play/pause, speed control, rewind 10s, repeat sentence
Save vocabulary words directly from video subtitles
Vocabulary page with saved words list
Quiz page with multiple-choice questions from watched content
Profile page with learning progress, stats, and settings
Bottom navigation across all main pages
Language selection: Uzbek and Russian translation support
